key_facts: The Xbox Games Showcase 2025 was held in June 2025 as a major Microsoft gaming event.
TrueAchievements published a recap article listing 31 games from the showcase.
Web search and web fetch tools were unavailable, preventing retrieval of the specific 31-game list.

The showcase typically includes first-party Xbox Game Studios titles, third-party exclusives, and Game Pass announcements.
